summary: Frontend testing of new features: Interactive SVG map of DRC provinces and Offline mode with Service Worker. All 9 features tested and verified successfully.
passed_tests: Provinces page shows 'Carte' and 'Grille' toggle buttons (data-testid='btn-view-carte', 'btn-view-liste')
Default view is 'Carte' showing SVG map component (data-testid='carte-rdc', 'carte-svg')
Map renders all 26 provinces as clickable path elements (data-testid='carte-province-{name}')
Map shows province names on each province (26 name labels found)
Map shows P.E. counts on each province (26 P.E. labels like '5 P.E.', '3 P.E.', '2 P.E.')
Map has color legend with 4 items: '1 P.E.', '2 P.E.', '3 P.E.', '5+ P.E.'
Clicking 'Grille' button switches to grid view with search bar (data-testid='search-input', 'provinces-grid')
Clicking a province on map (Nord-Kivu) navigates to province detail view (data-testid='admin-province-detail')
Back button in detail view works (data-testid='back-button')
Service worker file /service-worker.js returns 200 OK with correct cache configuration
Manifest.json /manifest.json returns 200 OK with app name 'Edu-Connect'
Service Worker is registered and active (scope: https://learning-hub-test-8.preview.emergentagent.com/)
OfflineBanner component integrated in App.js (returns null when online as expected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive SVG map feature fully working on Provinces page (/dashboard/provinces). Map shows 26 DRC provinces with color gradient based on P.E. count, province names, P.E. counts, and color legend. Toggle between Carte/Grille views works. Clicking province navigates to detail view. Offline mode: service-worker.js caches static assets and API responses (/api/stats/global, /stats/sexe, /stats/evolution, /stats/notes, /externe/sources/status). OfflineBanner component shows when navigator.onLine=false (cannot test without simulating offline). Service worker registered successfully.

interactive_svg_map.toggle_buttons: Carte/Grille buttons present with correct data-testid
interactive_svg_map.province_labels: Province names and P.E. counts shown on map
interactive_svg_map.color_legend: 4 color items (1 P.E., 2 P.E., 3 P.E., 5+ P.E.)
interactive_svg_map.grid_view: Search bar and grid cards in Grille view

offline_mode.sw_registration: Service worker registered with correct scope
offline_mode.offline_banner: Component exists in App.js, renders when offline (returns null when online)

screenshots_taken: provinces_grille_view.png - Grid view with search bar
province_detail_view.png - Nord-Kivu detail with 3 educational provinces
